goal: 让 agent 知道何时使用 notes rewrite recovery 检查

summary.title: 让 agent 发现 notes rewrite recovery 流程
summary.what: 把 notes rewrite recovery 从一个需要人工记住的恢复命令，接入到 agent 的常规入口：status/actionable 暴露只读 notes_health，preflight 输出 notes_rewrite_drift finding，CLI status 文本提示先跑 doctor，Mainline skill 和 AGENTS 模板写明 force-push、rebase、filter-repo、作者改写、contributors 清理、远端回滚等触发条件。
summary.why: 仅新增 doctor/migrate 命令还不够，agent 不会凭空知道何时使用它们；需要在 status/preflight 这些开工入口给机器可读信号，同时保持 repair 本身显式、可审阅、经用户确认。
summary.user_goal: 让 agent 知道何时使用 notes rewrite recovery 检查

decisions.chose: 在 status/actionable 和 preflight 中加入只读 notes drift 信号
decisions.rationale: skill 的默认开工路径会先跑 preflight/status；把信号放在这里，agent 才能在普通工作流里发现 doctor --notes，而不是依赖记忆或人工提醒。

decisions.chose: status/preflight 只推荐 mainline doctor --notes --json，不自动运行 migrate notes 或写远端 notes ref
decisions.rationale: refs/notes/mainline/intents 是共享团队状态；诊断可以自动提示，但迁移计划、写本地 notes、push notes 都必须保持显式。

decisions.chose: 同步更新 skills/mainline/SKILL.md 和 AGENTS 全量模板，并将 AGENTS managed block 升到版本 21
decisions.rationale: CLI JSON 信号解决机器可读发现，skill/template 解决 agent 对触发词和授权边界的理解，两者缺一块都会让命令继续像隐藏工具。

rejected.alternative: 让 status 或 preflight 直接尝试 migrate notes
rejected.reason: 这会把普通只读入口变成共享 notes ref 修复器，违反 notes recovery 必须显式、可审阅的边界。

rejected.alternative: 只改 Mainline skill，不改 CLI status/preflight
rejected.reason: skill 文字会漂移或未安装；CLI 自己必须提供机器可读信号，agent 才能稳定触发诊断。

review_notes: 本轮是 int_667a9497 的 discoverability follow-up；原 doctor/migrate repair 命令保持显式，默认迁移仍是 dry-run。
dogfood synthetic rewrite repo: status --actionable --json 返回 notes_rewrite item，preflight --json 返回 notes_rewrite_drift finding 和 mainline doctor --notes --json recommendation。
真实 mainline 仓库 dogfood 没有 notes drift 误报；status --actionable 仍只显示 active intent、coverage、proposal、draft 等现有事项。

architectural_claims: status and preflight are the read-only discovery layer for notes rewrite drift
doctor --notes remains the first diagnostic step; migrate notes remains a separate explicit repair step
agent guidance explains incident triggers and authorization boundaries rather than relying on agent memory
behavioral_changes: StatusResult may include notes_health when likely_history_rewrite is detected
mainline status --actionable ranks notes_rewrite before derived coverage/proposal queues when notes drift can invalidate them
preflight emits a notes_rewrite_drift warning and recommends mainline doctor --notes --json
human status output prints a notes rewrite drift warning before sync/coverage details

data_model_changes.name: AGENTS managed template version
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Existing managed blocks can be refreshed with mainline agents update.

security_implications: No automatic writes to refs/notes/mainline/intents are introduced
Guidance requires user confirmation before migrate notes --write or --push; --push remains a high-impact shared-ref operation
migration_notes: Existing AGENTS managed blocks can be refreshed with mainline agents update to pick up template version 21
